title: Create Simulated Additions
description: A few additions and tweaks for the Create Simulated mod
body:
![Text](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/54b6b8a10b296c70656d88af79cbb4ccef7e4965.png)

### Description
Adds 3 new engine types with different uses
- **V4 Engine**: Provides twice the SU of the Portable Engine, but consumes twice the fuel
- **I2 Engine**: Provides half the SU of the Portable Engine, but consumes half the fuel
- **Mid-Drive Engine**: Provides the same SU of the Portable Engine, and consumes the same amount of fuel, but gives power via a cog instead of a shaft

All engines can be turned vertically (unlike the Portable Engine) and have "clockwise", "counterclockwise", and "neutral" modes. Neutral mode stops the rotation and fuel consumption without having to remove fuel.

Adds 1 new redstone component
- **Redstone Computator**: Allows for addition, subtraction, multiplication, and division of redstone signals.

![Creative Tab](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5dcb2561c2b0c230c755969f0ab53426c96adea1.jpeg)

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

**Future Plans**:
- More Redstone Components (Logic Gates)
- Recipe Remake (for all engine types, including Portable Engine)
- and more
</details>

Questions? Join the [Discord](https://discord.com/invite/9j5QYM7TtK)
